title: May 19, 2026
sentiment: We build vaults for other people's dreams, and somewhere a machine still runs what we thought was lost.

stories.title: I've built a virtual museum with nearly every operating system you can think of
stories.summary: A single person archived nearly every operating system ever made, and now they all run in a browser — a quiet act of preservation that outlasts any company.

stories.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash
stories.summary: Google released Gemini 3.5 Flash — fast, capable, and forgettable in the way only the latest model can be.

stories.title: Show HN: Forge – Guardrails take an 8B model from 53% to 99% on agentic tasks
stories.summary: Adding structure around a small model — retry logic, error recovery, tool discipline — closes nearly all the gap with frontier models. The scaffolding matters.
